transcript.text:
(The essence of a good restaurant, underground shopping center)
(This place is located deep in there...)
(The Best of the Best?!)
(How big is it) The serving size is big
(for it to be called The Best of the Best...?)
(How big can it be...?)
(Full)
(Everyone) This is a rice paddle...
(Would you believe it) I thought the rice was a lot
(if this was 1 serving size...?) but there's more stir-fried squid so there's not enough rice
It's not decreasing no matter how much I eat...
I think this place has the biggest serving sizes
among other bunsik places
(Let's go meet the best of the best owner) I guess I'll get a margin if I sell more!
(Today's restaurant, Gongdeok Station Line 5)
Hello, everyone

I ate
Brazil tteokboki at 'Yalgae Bunsik' before
They look similar
I came here because I was craving freshly-made tteokbokki
(A restaurant that guarantees success) We're in a shopping center
It's been about 20 years, so there are a lot of regulars
I heard it's very inexpensive and the serving size is huge
Ah, it's here!
(Dohwa-dong, Mapo-gu) The name is 'The Best of the Best Rabokki'
(Various dishes other than bunsik) There are various dishes like 'Kimbap Heaven'
Anyway, I'll head inside
(Entered) Hello
(A friendly atmosphere where the memories remain) It feels like I came to a bunsik place from 20 years ago
The menu
There's a lot
(There are dishes for drinking as well) Ah, they're the same

I heard the tuna fried rice is good
Ma'am!
What's the popular dish
excluding tteokbokki and tuna fried rice?
Squid deopbap!
- The serving size is big - Oh really?
About this much
(Hold on)
I use this plate
(A whole plateful) This much rice...
- It's piled up like this - Really? Isn't it like 2-3 servings then?
People get surprised that it's 1 serving...
They ask, "Is this 2 servings?"!
(People even ask for less...) People often say, "give us less"...
(Just eat it) But I don't do that
(She's very generous with the servings!) because I got big hands

So if I order 5 servings, it'll be like I ordered 10 servings
Yes
(Today's order) Ma'am, I'll get 1 rabokki,
1 cheese rabboki,
1 kimchi sujebi,
1 squid doepbap,
and tuna fried rice
I heard you eat a lot!
Oh really? You know? Haha
(Someone that can handle this amount of food is here...) People say that
(The most popular dish, tuna fried rice)
(Filling up the plate as she said...)
It's served like this haha
(This squid deopbap doesn't look like 1 serving)
(This is the main dish)
(The Best of the Best Rabokki)

(Bunsik is here) Thank you
Wow, there's so much food...!
(A bigger one is coming..!)
(Can't stop being surprised...)
(Plentiful) Amazing
(There's more...)
(A full bowl of kimchi sujebi)
(Everything is served) Wow, thank you
(All the dishes are full) Everything is full
This is crazy
Wow, the serving size...
There's so much
(Is this right?) This is a lot too
Anyway, bon appétit
What should I eat first?
I should eat the cheese first

(Explosion of cheese...!) Wow, ramyun
Looks delicious!
It looks so good
Bon appétit!
It's been such a long time since I had this kind of rabokki
It has both ramyun and jjolmyeon
It's delicious...!
It's more delicious
than what I thought
They sell the old-school rabokki
in a big plate like this
(Old-school rabokki style..) It's the old-school style, very original..
The sauce is delicious
It's very nostalgic
It reminds me of old memories
Red pepper powder?

There are a lot of chunks
And it's
not really on the sweet side
It's not on the sweet or spicy side
(Very harmonized...!) The gochujang sauce is very flavorful
There's a gimmari here
Wow, this is freshly made
(Gimmari and yaki mandu) Yaki mandu!
Maybe because she added it in last
but the yaki mandu
is still hard
It's delicious
There's way more noodles
(That doesn't mean there's not a lot of tteok) Tteok is hidden at the bottom
The eggs are the highlight, right?
(Boiled egg mixed with the tteokbokki sauce)

Mix it up
It's not spicy at all
It's not on the spicy side!
Should I try the kimchi sujebi?
(Full) The amount...
is so...
What is this?
(A bowl full of affection) There's eomuk in here
Wow, this is real handmade sujebi
The sujebi is totally my taste
I love thick sujebi like this
Oh, this is so good
(Very familiar taste...!) It tastes just like the homemade sujebi!
(Huge spoon) This is a rice paddle...
Do I mix this?
(There's a lot of rice and squid) I thought there was a lot of rice,

(There's a lot of rice and squid) but there's more stir-fried squid so there's not enough rice
How much is this?
8,000 won?
(All of this is only 8,000 won?) Wow, no way! Two people can eat this
Ma'am, is this 8,000 won?
Yes, the deopbap is 8,000 won
- Tuna fried rice is 7,000 won - Oh really?
Two people can eat this 8,000 won dish
(Seriously, there's so much food...!) There is so much squid as well as the veggies
No way
And it's delicious too
It's so delicious
It's that sweet flavor that I like...
It's like..
very spicy and flavorful
(No wonder there are regulars) I know why there are a lot of regulars now

Should I try the tuna fried rice?
The kimchi must be delicious!
The seasoning is delicious
I don't really eat squid deopbap much
(It's very cheap for the great taste) I'll definitely order it again if I come next time
Is the yaki mandu
moist now?
Crispy outside, moist inside...
Moist outside inside...
Moist outside crispy inside!
If I was at 'Kimbap Heaven',
I would've already finished half of it all
(Still starting..) I haven't gone that far yet
(Many dishes are still waiting) I didn't even touch this one, and the others as well...
The fermented kimchi is so good!
The owner is...

She's very generous!
She uses so many ingredients for everything
Usually, if I order kimchi fried rice,
it's about this much
(It's literally twice more...) I think this much will be 1 serving
(Satisfied) It's delicious
(It's magic...) It doesn't seem to reduce even if I eat..
It's a new dish now, haha
(I definitely ate a lot, but it looks new..) Isn't this a normal serving?
How much is this?
7,000 won...?!
Whoa
It's an unbelievable price
They sell soju and beer too
(It's one perfect all-day restaurant) It can be a pub where you can drink
(It's one perfect all-day restaurant) at night

Oh nice
I always drink Coke...
I never drink tea
but their tea
(Something special?) is delicious
Mm? What kind of tea is this?
No.. It's not barley..
It's kinda of sour
I'll guess!
- Sunroot! - (Really?)
- Excuse me, Ma'am, what kind of tea is this? - It's herbal water
It's from herbs
including arrowroot
(Korean dendropanax that's good for your health) Do you know Korean dendropanax?
The leaves from it!
and sunroot!

(PD got it right) Sunroot!
(PD is so proud...) And jack beans and all that!
(Finally time to taste the classic rabokki)
It's seasoned very well
I'll gather it all together
(Egg party)
(Glancing)
You're eating very well just like what people say
Everyone wonders
if you really finish all the food
They wonder if you take some away
when you get a break or something
(Her not gaining weight should be a research topic...) I can't believe how you don't gain weight after eating so much food
(Meanwhile, the egg is all mashed...!)
Eggs! Mashed eggs!
What time does this place open?

I come at 10AM and open at
- 11AM - Oh, really?
- But it said the opening hour as 2PM - Everyone thinks that
You have to change it then!
(But it still says 2PM...) Some customers are helping me fix it
(She recently found out why the business is going down...) Since last summer...
- People didn't come for lunch since then? - I had no clue
- (When will it change...?) - On the internet,
it says that the restaurant opens at 2PM
so I thought it'd open at 2PM but it's actually 11AM
The mandu stays crispy
for a while!
The dishes here reminds me of
'Kimbap Heaven', the bunsik place, right?
Among all the bunsik places
that I've been to so far,

(Top place for the quantity) this place has the biggest servings haha
- (Are you Tzuyang by chance...?) - Hello
I always watch your videos every time I work out in the morning
You shine whenever you eat..!
- She finished them all... - (Really?) You ate them all?
People think that she takes away some food
but that's not true, she ate them all!
(The owner wants to tell everybody the truth) I saw her eating them all
She looks very slim on TV
- but even slimmer in the real life - (Blushing)
- (Enjoy!) Have a good day! - Thank you
She's the owner of
the bossam place over there
(I should go say hi to her before I leave)
Wow, there is so much eomuk!
1, 2, 3, 4

5, 6, 7, 8
8 pieces of eomuk!
Let's try!
(Let's not overdo it...)
The last egg!
(There is still more...) I'm pretty sure she added the whole package of eomuk
(Completed)
(Finished the tea as well...!) I finished the whole bottle of tea today
Amazing...
I've never seen anyone like this before
But same here!
I've never been to a restaurant that gives this much food!
Not like this...!
I'm sure other places are the same!
(Not really...) No, you give the most!
Do you even get a margin from this...?

Many people say that but..
(Swag) I guess I'll get a margin if I sell more!
- It was so delicious, thank you! - Thank you, haha
I had a great meal today as well!
- Can I get your autograph? - Of course!
(Bingo) Oh, this must be the price tag!
(Amazed by the cheap price again..)
(I had a great meal today as well) Thank you! I enjoyed it!
